working_on.notes: Implemented ModelQuotaManager with persistence for 429 (30h) and in-memory for 503 (5m). Verified with unit tests.

pending_tasks.task: Run on device for final verification

recent_changes.description: Implemented robust API error handling for Gemini: 429 errors ban (model, key) for 30 hours, 503 errors cooldown for 5 minutes. Added skip logic to GeminiApiClient.
Refactored ArticleContentFetcher (1500+ lines) into 19 smaller files using Facade + Strategy pattern. Reduced main class size by ~85% while maintaining public API compatibility.
Fixed Nested TypeAlias compilation error by moving data classes to top-level.
Created Unit Tests for ArticleContentFetcher. Verified Regex vs Jsoup fallback logic.

errors_encountered.error: Method w in android.util.Log not mocked
errors_encountered.solution: Used mockkStatic(android.util.Log::class) in Unit Test setup.

errors_encountered.error: Nested and local type aliases are not supported
errors_encountered.solution: Moved ArticleData and ContentCandidate to top-level classes and updated imports.

decisions_made.reason: 429 is a long-term ban (30h) needing persistence. 503 is transient (5m).
Delegate logic from ArticleContentFetcher to new components while keeping public API stable.
Encapsulate site-specific extraction logic in separate classes.
Kotlin doesn't support nested type aliases to same-named classes well, caused compilation error.
